mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, category, price, description, pictureurl, regid, regdate) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{price}, #{description}, #{pictureurl}, #{regid}, #{regdate})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, pictureurl = #{pictureurl}, regid = #{regid}, regdate = #{regdate} WHERE num = #{num}
mapper.select: SELECT num, name, category, price, description, pictureurl, regid, regdate FROM product ORDER BY num DESC
